title: Metaplex
summary: Metaplex is one of the foundational digital-asset protocols on Solana, now spanning token launches and broader launch tooling. Arcium includes it in the encrypted NFT ecosystem, but the public Metaplex materials I reviewed do not document a specific Arcium-powered feature.
description:
Metaplex now markets around token launches on Solana, built-in protections, and protocol-driven launch management, while still carrying the broader weight of Solana's digital-asset infrastructure heritage. That makes it relevant to Atlas even beyond classic NFTs.

Arcium includes Metaplex in the encrypted NFT ecosystem. That supports inclusion in Atlas, but I did not find a current Metaplex page documenting an explicit Arcium-powered module.

bodySections.title: Protocol_Surface
bodySections.body: Metaplex is no longer just shorthand for NFTs. The public site and docs now emphasize launch tooling, protocol rails, and developer-facing asset infrastructure on Solana, which makes it one of the broadest digital-asset surfaces in the ecosystem.

bodySections.title: Arcium_Relevance
bodySections.body: Arcium lists Metaplex among NFT ecosystem partners. That is enough for Atlas inclusion, but not enough to label the relationship as a confirmed integration from current public materials.

statusNote: Arcium includes Metaplex in its encrypted NFT ecosystem coverage, but I did not find a current Metaplex page documenting a specific Arcium-powered feature.

sources.label: Metaplex Website
sources.note: Official site describing Metaplex's launch and digital asset infrastructure.

sources.label: Metaplex Developers
sources.note: Official developer docs for Metaplex tools and protocol flows.

sources.label: Arcium Encrypted Ecosystem
